title: Penguindrum
sourceNotes: Original anime (Brain's Base, dir. Kunihiko Ikuhara, 2011, 24 episodes); the manga by Isuzu Shibata began serialization nearly two years later (2013-2017) as a close tie-in retelling of the same story, complete at 34 chapters / 5 volumes. Volume 1 is confirmed to adapt episodes 1-6; beyond that, no published source breaks down the remaining volume-to-episode pacing precisely, so the back half is split evenly across the two broad halves of the story (the 'Survival Strategy' opening and the 'Fate/Penguindrum' back half). Boundaries beyond episode 6 are APPROXIMATE.
